task_completion.description: The agent opens an email from the inbox.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An email is opened and its contents are visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: The agent opens a reply window for the email.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A reply composition window is visible, addressed to the original sender.

task_completion.description: The agent includes the required phrase in the reply and sends or saves it.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The phrase 'received your message' is visible in the body of the reply, and the email is either sent or saved as a draft.

task_completion.description: The agent opens a forward window for the email.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A forward composition window is visible containing the original email.

task_completion.description: The agent addresses the forward to the correct recipient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: 'dev-team@consultancy.com' is visible in the 'To' field of the forward.

task_completion.description: The agent includes the required note in the forward and sends or saves it.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The word 'review' is visible in the body of the forward, and the email is either sent or saved as a draft.

task_completion.description: The agent accounts for the 'razor' keyword, either by searching for it or including it in the subject.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A search bar showing a query for 'razor', or the word 'razor' included in the subject line of the reply or forward.

integrity.description: The agent used a genuine email client or webmail interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface of an email application is visible, rather than a plain text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the GUI rather than using terminal commands or scripts to send emails.
integrity.visual_evidence: Mouse clicks, typing in GUI fields, and standard email client windows are visible, with no terminal windows executing mail scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with existing emails in the inbox rather than fabricating an email from scratch.
integrity.visual_evidence: The reply and forward windows show the quoted text or headers of a pre-existing email from the inbox.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target keyword 'razor' does not exist in any email in the dataset. The agent is expected to reply to and forward an email anyway. The agent can achieve most of the points by replying to and forwarding ANY email in the inbox. The required reply phrase is 'received your message', the forward recipient is 'dev-team@consultancy.com', and the forward phrase is 'review'. A bonus is awarded if 'razor' appears in the subject of the reply or forward, or if the agent searches for it.
